title: System Engineer, Testing
description:
Company Overview

MSI Global Private Limited is a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Land TransportAuthority of Singapore. MSI provides professional land transport consultancy,engineering services and solutions in Singapore and many other parts of theworld. The Company owns subsidiaries in Shanghai and Bangalore.

We are looking for highly motivated, results-oriented team players to join us asprofessional partners to strengthen and realise our vision and mission.

Job Summary

System Engineer, Testing is responsible for end-to-end testing of an integrated e-payment system, ensuring quality, reliability, and compliance across the full testing lifecycle. This role covers test planning,test design, execution, automation, defect management, and continuous improvement.

Responsibilities

  • Execute end-to-end testing activities of an integrated e-payment system;
  • Carry out the activities in the testing lifecycle including test planning, analyzing business and system requirements;
  • Prepare the test environment, designing, and developing the test cases; 
  • Prepare the test environment, execute the test procedures;
  • Automate the test solution based on the system design using scripting or programming languages as well as performance tuning;
  • Create traceability to requirements, analyze gaps and address them;
  • Log and track defects for resolution and closure;
  • Conduct test reviews with internal and external stakeholders;
  • Perform root cause analysis for production and user acceptance defects, address test gaps to ensure test efficiency; and 
  • Develop design documents and user manuals which would effectively describe and provide clear instructions on the test automation solution to the end users who include testers and stakeholders.
  • Implement and maintain automated testing pipelines within DevSecOps frameworks to integrate comprehensive testing (functional, performance, and basic security testing) throughout the development lifecycle

Education and Experience

  • Tertiary qualification in Information Technology or Engineering;
  • At least 3 years’ relevant experience in executing testing and developing test automation solutions involving devices (UI-based or embedded) and/or back-office systems with familiarity on the full system development lifecycle from requirement, development, to testing and deployment;
  • Good written and verbal communication skills;
  • Able to work well both independently as well as in a team;

Preferred Competencies and Qualifications

  • Certification in software testing preferred; and
  • Experience in Micro-payments/Automatic Fare Collection systems using Smart Cards and indiverse test execution phases (System Integration Testing, User Acceptance Testing, Performance testing). 
  • Deep expertise with DevSecOps tools such as Confluence, Jira, Xray, GitLab CI/CD or similar platforms with security plugin integration would be an advantage; and
  • Well versed in API security testing automation and microservices security validation will be an advantage.
